name: adobe-animate-mcp
description: MCP server for Adobe Animate via CEP panel and JSFL bridge

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=build/index.js --packages=external && copyfiles -u 2 "src/cep/**/*" "build/extension/com.adobe.animatemcp.bridge" && node scripts/copy-cep-debug.mjs && copyfiles -u 1 "src/host/**/*" "build/extension/com.adobe.animatemcp.bridge"
